notes: File is a large witness-parametric cascade scaffold (T-V-1-001 through Artin fixed-field closure) with no sorries. About a third of the 47 declarations are unused within this file, suggesting they are infrastructure intended for external consumers or exploratory scaffolding. The file builds two parallel tracks: a Galois-cascade chain (S1–S11) reducing the fibre-witness requirement to IsGalois + Aut≃ker, and an Artin-machinery track (Layer 2) using FixedPoints.finrank_eq_card; both tracks rely heavily on translateAlgEquivOfPoint from EC/TranslationOrd.
